title: Moderation update
body: We reviewed today’s high-severity reports. Two accounts were removed after validation: spam_wave_42 for posting phishing links across multiple channels, and toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment toward newcomers. A separate report targeting a core maintainer was reviewed and determined to be brigading-related rather than a valid abuse case, so no action was taken on that member. All three high-severity reports have now been handled and closed. Thanks for continuing to report issues in good faith—it helps keep the community usable without punishing legitimate moderation activity.
